case_title: GIANG SINH VS DUMDUMAYA EDWIN TESORO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY GIANG SINH AS TO DEFENDANT DUMDUMAYA EDWIN TESORO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIANG SINH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUMDUMAYA EDWIN TESORO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POSTPONEMENT REQUEST FROM EDWIN DENIED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-09-1993, GRANTED
CERT. RECEIPT TO EDWIN DUMDUMAYA RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DUMDUMAYA EDWIN TESORO HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
